features.featureTitle: Pre-populate the backend with a set of realistic sample items across multiple categories for the prototype presentation. Include at least 20 items spanning: Textbooks (e.g., Engineering Drawing, DBMS, Circuit Theory, Data Structures, C Programming), Calculators (e.g., Casio FX-991ES Plus, Texas Instruments TI-84, Classwiz FX-570), Sports Utilities (e.g., Cricket Bat, Football, Badminton Racket, Shuttle Cocks, Volleyball), Lab Coats (e.g., White Lab Coat Size M, White Lab Coat Size L), DSLRs/Electronics (e.g., Nikon D3500 DSLR, Tripod Stand, USB Hub), and Hostel Essentials (e.g., Study Lamp, Extension Board, Electric Kettle). Each item must have: a realistic name, a short description, an appropriate category matching the existing category list, a per-day price in ₹ (within ₹5–₹50 range), an optional per-month price, a hostel-based location string (e.g., 'Hostel B, Room 204', 'Hostel A, Block 3'), and a plausible owner display name. These items should be seeded as initial/demo data accessible without authentication on the Borrow page.
